description: Custom reroute pipeline for the splunk_hec integration. Called automatically after logs-splunk_hec.event-default. Add reroute processors here to fan events out to sourcetype-specific integrations.

reroute.description: Route Cisco ASA events to the Elastic Cisco ASA integration
Route Palo Alto PAN-OS events to the Elastic Palo Alto Networks integration

append.value: Processor '{{{ _ingest.on_failure_processor_type }}}' with tag '{{{ _ingest.on_failure_processor_tag }}}' in pipeline '{{{ _ingest.pipeline }}}' failed with message '{{{ _ingest.on_failure_message }}}'
